design_philosophy: Tactical, professional red team tool with a modern cyberpunk/matrix aesthetic. Focus on high-density data, real-time feedback, operational clarity, and high-contrast terminal elements.

primary_panel.effects: relative overflow-hidden before:absolute before:inset-0 before:bg-[linear-gradient(transparent_50%,rgba(0,255,65,0.02)_50%)] before:bg-[length:100%_4px] before:pointer-events-none

global.override_shadcn: Override all default Shadcn border radii to `rounded-none`. Strip out gray default borders and replace with `border-[#00FF41]/25`.
global.testing: All interactive elements MUST have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="toggle-autonomous-mode"`).

dashboard_cards.style: Retro-Futurism Terminal Look. Sharp square corners, 1px solid neon green/25 borders.
dashboard_cards.content: Use bright green for primary metrics, muted green for labels. Avoid generic icons; use technical glyphs.

terminal_logs.container: bg-[#020302] border border-[#00FF41]/30 font-mono text-xs p-4 h-full overflow-y-auto scrollbar-hide
terminal_logs.text_colors: Prefix commands with `$` in cyan (`#00F0FF`). Success logs in green, errors in red (`#FF003C`), info in muted green.

attack_graph.instructions: Pitch black background. Nodes represent systems. Color coding: Red (uncompromised target), Yellow (in progress/scanning), Green (compromised/session active). Links should be low opacity cyan, turning bright green when lateral movement is successful.

attack_chain_pipeline.library: react-flow-renderer or Flexbox with SVG arrows
attack_chain_pipeline.instructions: Horizontal pipeline nodes: [SCAN] -> [ENUM] -> [EXPLOIT] -> [POST]. Active node glows neon green, pending nodes are dim outlined, failed nodes pulse neon red.

c2_console.style: Split pane: Left side shows active sessions (green IPs, OS identifiers), Right side is the interactive command terminal.

ai_decision_panel.style: High-contrast tactical panel. AI suggestions appear via Framer Motion typewriter effect. 'ACCEPT' button in solid green (`bg-[#00FF41] text-black`), 'IGNORE' button with red outline (`border-[#FF003C] text-[#FF003C]`).

autonomous_mode_toggle.style: Massive, highly visible switch/button. When OFF: dim red border. When ON: Intense neon green glow (`shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(0,255,65,0.5)]`), pulsing effect, text changes to 'AUTONOMOUS APT ENGAGED'.

accessibility_and_interactions.animations: Subtle pulsing for active attacks. Matrix rain or scanline CSS overlay for background texture. Avoid overly bouncy physics; motion should be rigid, instant, and tactical.

images.description: Terminal-style UI relies entirely on CSS repeating-linear-gradient for scanlines, noise textures, and pure hex colors. No external raster background image is required to maintain maximum rendering performance and sharp technical aesthetic.
